form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th on April 8 over 300m at this track behind So Glamorous beaten 5 lengths (17.52) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on March 6 over 350m at this track behind Bengal Beast beaten 9 lengths (20.47). On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at this track over 300m (17.42) beating Aston Bondi in Bottom Up - Grade 6 on April 8. In-form and measures right up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at Shepparton. Looks tested in this company.
